assumptions: Charges & collections = Buildium journals at tenant grain, allocated at each row's DATE (the Feb-01 rent belongs to the tenant still in the unit on Feb-01; a tenancy's final day belongs to the successor's move-in rows). Payer names override payment allocation; Active/Last status per owner's column.

Collection rate (owner formula): [collections + opening advances − closing advances] ÷ [invoices + opening due]. Multi-month spans use the telescoped form: Σ actual collections ÷ (opening due at span start + Σ invoices).

Collection Loss = moved-out tenants' residuals, taken FROM the AR file's write-off entries (owner judgment); the stated lease rule runs alongside as a memo. May movers use the lease rule until the June file lands. Movers not yet written off stay on the book and are listed.

Refunds sit OUTSIDE tenant AR (the file's book) and are deducted from cash kept as refunds-paid-out — EXCEPT in-month settlements (owner rule, Dylan McNulty case): a mover with no AR row whose whole story lands in one month runs the refund through the ledger, settling to $0 with the kept portion as income. Advances are never refunded — 100% applied to future charges.
Scheduled principal & door escrow from the loans engine; prepay/release/payoff cash = financing events, not operating.
Statutory cash-out = actual T&I escrow + direct PT/Ins payments from Cashflow.xlsx; HOA cash pending — GL accrual as proxy.
Bank balances & contributions/distributions pending — cash kept is derived, not yet tied to bank movement.
